title: Learn to Fly
album: There Is Nothing Left To Lose
why_this_song: Learn to Fly by Foo Fighters (1999) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Lookin' for a sign of life
Lookin' for somethin' to help me burn out bright
And I'm lookin' for a complication
Lookin' cause I'm tired of lyin'
Lookin' cause I'm tired of tryin'
Make my way back home when I learn to fly high
Make my way back home when I learn to
Fly along with me, I can't quite make it alone

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "lookin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "lookin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "life" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "life" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Run and tell all of the angels
I think I'm dyin' nursing patience
Try to make this life my own

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Lookin' for a sign of life
I'm lookin' to the sky to save me

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Learn to Fly" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Learn to Fly" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Learn to Fly" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Learn to Fly", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Learn to Fly" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Learn to Fly" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
